recommendations.title: Hey Arnold! The Jungle Movie
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Animation, Adventure, TV Movie, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: When their trip to San Lorenzo takes a turn for the worst, Arnold and his classmate’s only hope of getting home is retracing the dangerous path that led to Arnold's parents' disappearance.

recommendations.title: Torch Song Trilogy
recommendations.overview: Arnold Beckoff is looking for love and acceptance, but as a gay man working as a female impersonator in 1970s New York City, neither come easily. After a series of heartaches, Arnold believes he has found the love of his life in Alan, and the couple

recommendations.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Adventure, Drama, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Arnold and his friends must recover a stolen document in order to prevent the neighborhood from being bulldozed.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Pumping Iron
recommendations.overview: Amateur and professional bodybuilders prepare for the 1975 Mr. Olympia and Mr. Universe contests as five-time champion Arnold Schwarzenegger defends his Mr. Olympia title against Serge Nubret and the shy young Lou Ferrigno.

recommendations.title: Charlie Countryman
recommendations.overview: A young American falls hard for a Romanian cellist whose father has recently died -- and whose violent past could bring about his own demise.

recommendations.title: The Family Plan
recommendations.overview: Dan Morgan is many things: a devoted husband, a loving father, a celebrated car salesman. He's also a former assassin. And when his past catches up to his present, he's forced to take his unsuspecting family on a road trip unlike any other.

recommendations.title: Capturing the Friedmans
recommendations.overview: An Oscar nominated documentary about a middle-class American family who is torn apart when the father Arnold and son Jesse are accused of sexually abusing numerous children. Director Jarecki interviews people from different sides of this tragic story

recommendations.title: Fluke

recommendations.title: Frankenweenie
